Migrate to Zoho Books for free
Now you can easily move from other accounting solutions to Zoho Books!
Contact us
Incessant price hikes crippling you?
Why businesses choose Zoho Books:
Plans for every kind of business
No frequent price hikes
User-friendly interface
Excellent support
Seamless migration
And more!
Trusted by businesses and accountants worldwide
I switched from QuickBooks to Zoho Books because it's incredibly user-friendly. Zoho Books has simplified our financial processes. I trust Zoho Books.
Mathew O'Brien
Founder, ECM MEDIA LLC
Trusted by businesses and accountants worldwide
Zoho Books streamlined what QuickBooks couldn’t, saving us hours. Now we are able to manage our financial structure better.
Robert Craig
Co-CEO, The Accounting Lab LLC
Switch to Zoho Books
Spotlight
Engineered to Unlock Business Growth
AI in Accounting
Ask questions in plain English, spot anomalies early, and automate collections with AI built into your accounting platform.
Take your business global
Make foreign transactions easily with our multi-currency feature. Exchange rates are automatically applied in real-time.
Collaboration made easy
Enhance communication with your team members, customers, and vendors through powerful collaboration features.
Zoho Books Mobile Apps
Zoho Books is not only available on the web; you can use it on iOS or Android to manage your accounting on the go
Automation that saves you time
Bogged down with repetitive tasks? Zoho Books could automate it for you; be it workflows or emails or alerts.
Customize basis business need
Be it email templates or invoices, or custom fields or reports, if you have a unique business need, you can address it with Zoho Books.
User favorites
Features that your
accounting software must have!
Receivables
Speed up your receivables process with professional invoices and quotes. Set up multiple payment modes, use online payment links, automate follow-ups and get paid faster.
Payables
Stay on top of your payables. Track bills, automate recurring expenses, and include client expenses on invoices.
Inventory
Take full control of your inventory. Stock information gets updated as you purchase & sell. You can set reorder alerts too.
Projects
Manage your projects efficiently. Define budgets, allocate tasks, bill clients accurately, and get real-time insights to boost profitability.
Reports
Make informed business decisions with our powerful reports. Get actionable insights and schedule reports to get them delivered to you and your team.
Explore Features
Pricing
The perfect balance of features and affordability

How can I help you?
Help Documentation
Get started with Zoho Books and learn about its features using our comprehensive help guide.
FAQ
Find detailed answers to the most common questions you might have while using Zoho Books.
Videos
Watch the features of Zoho Books in action through videos.
Migration Guide
Moving to Zoho Books from another accounting software? Learn how to migrate effortlessly.
Blogs
Stay updated on all the features we release in Zoho Books. Also, know about some interesting tips for your business.
Essential Business Guides
Get helpful information on how you can manage your finances with our comprehensive business guides and grow your business successfully.
Find an Accountant
Check out our list of financial experts including advisors and accountants and connect with them instantly.
Welcome Guide
Set up an account, add users, create transactions and get rolling with Zoho Books.
Forums
Connect with the worldwide community of Zoho Books’ users and participate in active discussions about the product and its features. Our team of experts are here to help you out.

analysis.name: Zoho Books
analysis.tagline: Comprehensive accounting software for growing businesses
analysis.value_proposition: Cloud accounting platform for growing businesses that manages end-to-end financials from invoicing to inventory and expenses.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growing small and mid-sized businesses, startups, non-profits, and accounting firms migrating from QuickBooks

features.name: quotes
features.description: Create and send price quotes to customers

features.name: project management
features.description: Track projects with budgeted and billed hours

features.name: banking
features.description: Bank feeds with matched and categorized transactions

features.name: inventory management
features.description: Track opening stock, stock in hand, committed and available stock
features.evidence_quote: Opening-stock 210.00 Stock in Hand 150.00 Committed Stock 100.00

features.name: document management
features.description: Attach and store documents alongside transactions

features.name: financial reporting
features.evidence_quote: P & L Report Income Sales... Expenses

features.name: ai in accounting
features.description: Ask questions in plain English, spot anomalies, automate collections
features.evidence_quote: Ask questions in plain English, spot anomalies early, and automate collections with AI

features.name: 1099 and w-9 management
features.description: Manage 1099-MISC, 1099-NEC and W-9 forms for contractors

features.name: mobile accounting
features.description: iOS and Android apps for accounting on the go
features.evidence_quote: Zoho Books is not only available on the web; you can use it on iOS or Android

features.name: windows desktop app
features.description: Native Windows desktop app for cloud accounting
features.evidence_quote: Windows Experience cloud accounting from your familiar desktop device

features.name: collaboration and portal management
features.description: Client and vendor portals for collaboration

features.name: vendor portal
features.description: Portal for vendors to view POs, invoices, payments and statements
features.evidence_quote: Vendor portal... Purchase Order Invoices Payment Received Statement

features.name: customer portal
features.description: Portal for customers to interact with the business

features.name: smart automations
features.evidence_quote: Bogged down with repetitive tasks? Zoho Books could automate it for you

features.name: workflow automation
features.evidence_quote: be it workflows or emails or alerts

features.name: multi-currency
features.description: Foreign transactions with real-time exchange rates
features.evidence_quote: Make foreign transactions easily with our multi-currency feature. Exchange rates are automatically applied in real-time

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Add custom fields to address unique business needs
features.evidence_quote: custom fields or reports, if you have a unique business need

features.name: custom reports
features.description: Build custom reports for business needs

features.name: custom email templates
features.evidence_quote: Be it email templates or invoices

features.name: audit trail
features.description: Track accountant changes with an audit trail

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Timer for tracking billable time on projects

features.name: migration assistance
features.description: Free migration from other accounting solutions
features.evidence_quote: Migrate to Zoho Books for free... easily move from other accounting solutions

features.name: help documentation
features.evidence_quote: Get started with Zoho Books and learn about its features using our comprehensive help guide

features.name: community forums
features.evidence_quote: Forums Connect with the worldwide community of Zoho Books' users

features.name: find an accountant
features.description: Directory of financial experts and accountants
features.evidence_quote: Find an Accountant... list of financial experts including advisors and accountants

features.name: webinars
features.description: Free weekly webinars for onboarding and product education
features.evidence_quote: Join us for a weekly webinar session

features.name: multi-region editions
features.description: Localized editions for 15+ regions (US, UK, IN, AU, CA, EU, MEA)
features.evidence_quote: Editions and Languages Australia... India... UAE... United States

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Multiple languages including English, Arabic, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese, Dutch
features.evidence_quote: English العربية... Spanish... Deutsch... Português... Nederlands

features.name: startup edition
features.evidence_quote: Startups Smart and agile accounting solution

features.name: non-profit edition
features.description: Fund and donation management for non-profits
features.evidence_quote: Non Profit Categorically manage funds and donations

features.name: accounting firm tools
features.evidence_quote: Introducing Zoho Practice The ultimate practice management software

features.name: cash flow management
features.description: Stay on top of cash flow and tax compliance
features.evidence_quote: Stay on top of cash flow and tax compliance

features.name: project budgeting
features.description: Set budget hours by project and user

differentiators: Plans for every kind of business with no frequent price hikes (vs QuickBooks)
Free migration from other accounting solutions
Deep integration with the broader Zoho ecosystem (50+ Zoho apps)
Localized editions for 15+ countries with region-specific tax compliance
Native mobile apps (iOS/Android) plus Windows desktop app
AI-powered plain-English querying, anomaly detection, and collections automation

recent_ships.what: AI in Accounting — plain-English queries, anomaly detection, automated collections
recent_ships.source: Ask questions in plain English, spot anomalies early, and automate collections with AI built into your accounting platform

recent_ships.what: Zoho Books Essentials Roadshow at Irving, Texas on June 30, 2026
recent_ships.source: Join us at the Zoho Books Essentials Roadshow | Irving, Texas | June 30th, 2026

recent_ships.what: Zoho Practice launched as dedicated practice management for accounting firms
recent_ships.source: Introducing Zoho Practice The ultimate practice management software for modern accounting and bookkeeping firms

praised: 'I switched from QuickBooks to Zoho Books because it's incredibly user-friendly. Zoho Books has simplified our financial processes.' — Mathew O'Brien, ECM Media LLC
'Zoho Books streamlined what QuickBooks couldn't, saving us hours.' — Robert Craig, The Accounting Lab
'Switching to Zoho Books from QuickBooks truly steadied our ship. The change has saved us approximately 20-30% of the time.' — Kim Morhardt, BoxDrop
'All of the same functionality with the addition of customization and integrations.' — John Ota, Zenatta Consulting
No frequent price hikes (repeated positioning against QuickBooks)
complaints: HN discussion notes heavy paper-based invoicing friction in small business (adjacent thread, not direct product complaint)
Limited independent G2/review-site content accessible; sentiment signal is thin outside vendor-curated testimonials

free_tier.limits: Free plan for businesses under $50K USD revenue (per historical Zoho Books US pricing); 14-day free trial on paid plans

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Basic accounting for very small businesses under revenue threshold

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Invoicing, expenses, banking, basic reporting for growing SMBs

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Adds bills, sales/purchase orders, inventory, project tracking

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom workflows, vendor portal, budgeting, advanced reporting

tiers.name: Ultimate
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced analytics via Zoho Analytics, higher user/txn caps

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned navigation-only text — specific tier prices were not visible in the source scrape. Zoho Books historically uses a flat monthly price per organization (not per seat), with each tier including a fixed number of users and add-on user pricing (~$2.50/user/mo). Free tier is revenue-gated (~$50K USD). Regional pricing varies significantly across 15+ localized editions.
